afterSwap(address,(address,address,uint2.details: This is called by PoolManager during the swap

params.delta: The balance change from the swap

returns._0: The bytes return (empty for this implementation)

executeBuyback(address,(address,address,.details: Uses Uniswap v4 PoolManager.swap() with callback settlement

params.poolKey: The Uniswap v4 pool for token -> VielFI
params.sqrtPriceLimitX96: Price limit for the swap (use TickMath.MAX_SQRT_PRICE-1 or MIN+1)
params.token: The fee token to swap (e.g., USDC)
params.zeroForOne: True if swapping token0 for token1

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

afterSwap(address,(address,address,uint2.notice: Callback from PoolManager to settle the swap

collectEntryFee(address,uint256).notice: Calculate and collect entry fee. Called by ERC20VeilCore on deposit.

collectExitFee(address,uint256).notice: Calculate and collect exit fee. Called by ERC20VeilCore on withdraw.

emergencyWithdraw(address,uint256).notice: Emergency withdrawal in case of stuck funds. Guardian only.

executeBuyback(address,(address,address,.notice: Execute buyback when threshold reached. Anyone can call (public good).

sweepExitFees(address).notice: Sweep exit fees to vesting treasury. Callable by anyone.
